svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="User Registration" id="Md07MzhQ_YLtNMia1D9n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1323" dy="715" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="200" pageHeight="413" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-223" parent="1" style="shape=rect;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=center;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Fleet Dashboard & Analytics System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="760" x="180" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-224" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Fleet Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="30" x="70" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-225" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="View Fleet
Dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="220" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-226" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Drill Down into
Specific KPI Card" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="220" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-227" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Retrieve Aggregated
Fleet Data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="480" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-228" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Render KPI Summary
(Vehicles, Score, Alerts)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="480" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-229" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Auto-Refresh Data
in Near Real-Time" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="480" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-230" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Display 'Waiting for
Data' State (Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="740" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-231" edge="1" parent="1"
